{% set full_title = page_title ~ " · " ~ site_name %}{% if page_title == site_name %}{% set full_title = site_name %}{% endif %} {{ full_title }} {# Preload critical fonts so font fetch starts in parallel with CSS parse, not after. Saves ~100ms FCP on cold loads. Limit to the three fonts used above the fold (serif body, sans display, mono labels). #} {% if is_playground %} {% endif %} {% if lang_dir == "rtl" %} {% endif %} {% include "partials/header.html" %}
{# Translations are always flagged as possibly stale. We don't track translation freshness; pretending we do would lie to readers. The banner appears on every non-default-language page. #} {% if not is_default_language %}
{{ ui.translation_stale }}
{% endif %}
{{ ui.untranslated_banner }}
{% block layout %}{% endblock layout %} {# The playground fills the entire viewport below the header, so a footer would force a page scrollbar. Skip it on that route. #} {% if not is_playground %} {% include "partials/footer.html" %} {% endif %} {% if is_homepage %}{% endif %} {% block page_scripts %}{% endblock page_scripts %}
